definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

  "title": "增长并非单向链路，而是持续循环",
  "page_index": 43,
  "page_range": "43"
}

Section text:
增长并非单向链路，而是持续循环
www.aarki.com当下的增长路径并非一条直线，而是信号、内容与行为之间持续交换并随
时间不断累积的过程 。

message.content: This section addresses questions regarding the conceptual nature of modern growth strategies. It provides a foundational definition and claim that contemporary growth is not a linear, one-way process, but rather a continuous, self-reinforcing cycle. Specifically, it characterizes growth as an ongoing exchange that accumulates over time among three core components/entities: signals, content, and behavior. The content is attributed to Aarki (www.aarki.com). It does not contain specific dates, operational procedures, quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or empirical evidence types.

Specifically, it characterizes growth as an ongoing exchange that accumulates over time among three core components/entities: signals, content, and behavior.
